block.next_step: Investigate the enemy-phase prediction miss before solving or advancing another final-island turn.
block.resolve_reason: Turn 3 post-enemy mismatch came from a real Control Shot click_miss on DungBoss. The solver prediction assumed DungBoss moved to E8, but fresh reads showed the leader stayed on B7 and the enemy phase resolved from that actual board, causing the extra grid/building/mech damage. Current turn 4 board is fresh and known at grid 2 with all mechs alive; continue without relying on boss Control Shot.
